name: lsp-now
description: Full LSP protocol access via MCP — diagnostics, code actions, rename, completions, and more

configurationOptions.name: LSP_COMMAND
configurationOptions.description: The LSP server command to run (e.g., 'ty', 'rust-analyzer', 'gopls')

configurationOptions.name: LSP_ARGS
configurationOptions.description: Space-separated arguments for the LSP server (e.g., 'server')

configurationOptions.name: LSP_ROOT
configurationOptions.description: Workspace root path. Defaults to current working directory.
